description: Thread-level interaction policy. Field schema compatible with app.bsky.feed.threadgate. For private-tier threads, allow-rules are additional constraints on top of audience-list membership.

post.description: The root post the threadgate applies to.

mentionRule.description: Allow replies from users mentioned in the post.

followingRule.description: Allow replies from users the post's author follows.

listRule.description: Allow replies from members of a specific list.
